# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "hostingPlanName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "appInsightsName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "assignRolesAtScopes": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "systemAssignedPrincipalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
    "storageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "keyVaultId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
    "sqlServerId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "cosmosAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosAccountName'))]",
    "roleDefinitionIds": {
      "storageBlobDataContributor": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]",
      "storageQueueDataContributor": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88')]",
      "keyVaultSecretsOfficer": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b86a8fe4-44ce-4948-aee5-eccb2c155cd7')]",
      "keyVaultCryptoOfficer": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '14b46e9e-c2b7-41b4-b07b-48a6ebf60603')]",
      "sqlDbContributor": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '9b7fa17d-e63e-47b0-bb0a-15c516ac86ec')]",
      "cosmosDbAccountContributor": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '5bd9cd88-fe45-4216-938b-f97437e15450')]"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Insights/components",
      "apiVersion": "2020-02-02",
      "name": "[parameters('appInsightsName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "web",
      "properties": {
        "Application_Type": "web"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2022-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('hostingPlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Y1",
        "tier": "Dynamic"
      },
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2022-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "alwaysOn": false,
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
              "value": "~4"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
              "value": "dotnet-isolated"
            },
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
            },
            {
              "name": "APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY",
              "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName')), '2020-02-02').InstrumentationKey]"
            },
            {
              "name": "APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING",
              "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName')), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString]"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "1"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('assignRolesAtScopes')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('storageAccountId'), variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId'), 'StorageBlobDataContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('storageAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('roleDefinitionIds').storageBlobDataContributor]",
        "principalId": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('assignRolesAtScopes')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('storageAccountId'), variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId'), 'StorageQueueDataContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('storageAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('roleDefinitionIds').storageQueueDataContributor]",
        "principalId": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('assignRolesAtScopes')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('keyVaultId'), variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId'), 'KeyVaultSecretsOfficer')]",
      "scope": "[variables('keyVaultId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('roleDefinitionIds').keyVaultSecretsOfficer]",
        "principalId": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('assignRolesAtScopes')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('keyVaultId'), variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId'), 'KeyVaultCryptoOfficer')]",
      "scope": "[variables('keyVaultId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('roleDefinitionIds').keyVaultCryptoOfficer]",
        "principalId": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('assignRolesAtScopes')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('sqlServerId'), variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId'), 'SqlDbContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('sqlServerId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('roleDefinitionIds').sqlDbContributor]",
        "principalId": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('assignRolesAtScopes')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('cosmosAccountId'), variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId'), 'CosmosDbAccountContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('cosmosAccountId')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('roleDefinitionIds').cosmosDbAccountContributor]",
        "principalId": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionAppResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    },
    "principalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('systemAssignedPrincipalId')]"
